title: Integrate Fileverse
summary: Wire the Fileverse collaboration suite into the Logos App so users can edit and share documents end-to-end encrypted.
description: Fileverse provides an open-source, privacy-respecting collaboration suite. We are funding the integration work that makes Fileverse a first-class citizen inside the Logos App: account linking, document sharing flows, and cross-app deep links. Deliverables: a Logos App module that bundles the Fileverse client, documentation for integrators, and at least two demo workflows (collaborative editing + private folder sharing).
